creator: chris@holly.dyndns.org
text:
Tons of missing data, out-of-date data, and some bad sgml in
	this file.

Fix: 

The udiff is almost 300 lines long, so I've made it availible at
http://www.calldei.com/~chris/kernelconfig.diffs.gz
How-To-Repeat: 
	Read the kernel config section of the handbook!
